message:
Command `
ORPID=956540
echo "=== DETAILED PROCESS CHECK $(date) ==="
echo "--- Multiple TIME readings 5 seconds apart ---"
for i in 1 2 3; do
    TIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    CPU=$(ps -p $ORPID -o %cpu= 2>/dev/null)
    STATE=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2}')
    echo "  Read $i: TIME=$TIME CPU=$CPU% State=$STATE"
    sleep 5
done

echo ""
echo "--- /proc status ---"
cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads|VmSwap)"

echo ""
echo "--- Syscall state ---"
cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:

", "timeout": 30}
function.name: execute_bash
